about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Developer, writer, curious human.
about.bio1: Hi! I'm a software developer passionate about building things on the web. I write about technology, design systems, developer experience, and the occasional personal reflection.
about.bio2: This blog is built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and powered by Notion as a headless CMS. All articles are written and managed directly in Notion.
about.getInTouchText: Feel free to reach out via
about.bio: Passionate about coding, building weird but fun things, exploring everything when I can — on my way to becoming a full-stack developer.
